question: How many items do I need to pick up or return from a store?

bank_profile.retain_mission: Extract persistent user tasks, shopping actions, item status updates, and store-related obligations.
bank_profile.reflect_mission: Answer from current retained memory evidence and preserve counts across sessions.

messages.content: I need to pick up my navy blue blazer from dry cleaning this week.
The Zara boots I bought are too small. I need to return them and pick up the larger replacement pair when it arrives.
I will remember the return and pickup.
